entries.title: Movement
entries.body: Use WASD (keyboard) or the left stick (gamepad) to walk. Hold SHIFT to walk quietly so the biomatter does not hear you.

entries.title: Interaction
entries.body: Walk up to an interactable and press E (keyboard) or A (gamepad). Hold-to-tap players should release the button within 0.5s.

entries.title: Inventory
entries.body: Press I (keyboard) or TAB (gamepad) to open the inventory. Drag rows to move items. Equip a tool to use it on the next interact.

entries.title: Saving
entries.body: Auto-saves happen at every objective. Press F5 to save manually and F9 to load.

entries.title: Travel
entries.body: Once propulsion is online, the lifeboat can jump to a new derelict. Each jump costs oxygen and exposes you to the Sargasso.

entries.title: Objectives
entries.body: Each derelict has a sequence of objectives. The top-left tracker shows the current one. Completing objectives unlocks new areas.

entries.title: Fire Hazard
entries.body: Fire spreads to adjacent rooms every tick. Use a fire extinguisher or vent the room to space to clear it.

entries.title: Low Oxygen
entries.body: Your suit's oxygen drains continuously. Refill at the lifeboat or a refill station. Below 0.0 you suffocate.

entries.title: Circuit Board
entries.body: Required to repair the junction that unlocks the lifeboat's propulsion. Found in derelict loot containers.

entries.title: Portable Oxygen Pump
entries.body: Carried in the player inventory. Reduces the suit's oxygen drain multiplier to 0.5x.

entries.title: Fire Extinguisher
entries.body: Use on a burning room to clear the fire in one tick. Single-use.

entries.title: Biomatter Membrane
entries.body: A membrane blocking a doorway. Cut it with a knife tool or wait for it to dissolve.

entries.title: Junction Calibrator
entries.body: Reduces the number of repair steps required on a junction by 1. Consumed on use.

entries.title: Scanner
entries.body: Press TAB to toggle the scanner. Lists nearby derelicts and their range. Pick a target and press Enter to travel.

entries.title: Codex
entries.body: Every tutorial you see unlocks its matching codex entry here. Press F1 (keyboard) or Back (gamepad) to open.
